an7.27:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, I will teach you seven principles of non-decline. Listen and attend closely. I will speak."
an7.27:1.2: "Yes, Bhante," those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
an7.27:2.1: (1) As long as the bhikkhus develop the perception of impermanence, only growth is to be expected for them, not decline.
an7.27:2.2:
2
(2) As long as they develop the perception of non-self … (3) … the perception of unattractiveness … (4) … the perception of danger … (5) … the perception of abandoning … (6) … the perception of dispassion … (7) … the perception of cessation, only growth is to be expected for them, not decline.
an7.27:2.3:
3
"Bhikkhus, as long as these seven principles of non-decline continue among the bhikkhus, and the bhikkhus are seen
in them, only growth is to be expected for them, not decline."
